name: Chocolate Maple Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in margarine until crumbly.
3. Stir in 1 beaten egg. Press evenly into a 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 25 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, beat sweetened condensed milk, remaining egg, and flavoring.
6. Stir in nuts. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the prepared crust.
7. Top with the nut mixture. Bake for 25 more minutes or until lightly brown.
8. Cool. Cut into bars. Store tightly covered at room temperature. Makes 24 - 36 bars.
